connections.name: GitHub
connections.auth_pattern: GitHub App for shared automation; fine-grained PAT for local testing

connections.name: Slack
connections.auth_pattern: Slack app bot token or incoming webhook for one-channel posts

connections.name: Google Drive
connections.auth_pattern: OAuth or service account with approved domain-wide delegation

connections.name: Google Calendar
connections.auth_pattern: OAuth or admin-approved service account delegation

connections.name: Linear
connections.auth_pattern: OAuth for team app; personal API key for local testing

connections.name: Jira
connections.use_for: enterprise project tracking and issue updates

connections.name: Notion
connections.use_for: workspace pages, databases, lightweight knowledge base
connections.auth_pattern: internal connection token or OAuth public connection

connections.name: HubSpot
connections.auth_pattern: private app access token for internal automation; OAuth for public apps

connections.name: MCP Server
connections.use_for: standardized tools and resources for agent clients
connections.auth_pattern: local server first; explicit tool and resource allowlist
